Domanin2D:
class Domanin2D(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        control_pts = [
            (2.0, 0.0),
            (1.0, 1.6),
            (-1.2, 1.4),
            (-2.0, 0.1),
            (-1.0, -1.2),
            (1.4, -1.6),
        ]
        complex_domain = FiniteElement(control_points=control_pts, control_smoothness=32)
        complex_domain.move_to(ORIGIN)
        self.add(complex_domain)
Domain2D:
class Domain2D(MovingCameraScene):
    def construct(self):
        control_pts = [
            (2.0, 0.0),
            (1.0, 1.6),
            (-1.2, 1.4),
            (-2.0, 0.1),
            (-1.0, -1.2),
            (1.4, -1.6),
        ]
        complex_domain = CommplexElement(control_points=control_pts, control_smoothness=32)
        complex_domain.set_stroke(BLUE, width=3).move_to(ORIGIN)
        complex_domain_stroke = complex_domain.complex_domain.copy().set_fill(
            opacity=0
        ).set_stroke(BLUE, width=3)
        self.add(complex_domain, complex_domain_stroke)
        tex = Tex("Complex Domain", color=BLUE).next_to(complex_domain, UP)
        def _update_tex(mobj):
            mobj.next_to(complex_domain, UP)
        tex.add_updater(_update_tex)
        self.add(tex)
        self.play(Write(tex), run_time=2)
        self.play(
            complex_domain_stroke.animate.move_to(RIGHT * 3),
            complex_domain.animate.move_to(LEFT * 3),
            run_time=3,
        )
        tex.remove_updater(_update_tex)
        tex.next_to(complex_domain, UP)
        self.camera.frame.save_state()
        aspect = self.camera.frame.get_width() / self.camera.frame.get_height()
        target_width = max(
            complex_domain_stroke.get_width(),
            complex_domain_stroke.get_height() * aspect,
        ) * 1.2
        self.play(
            self.camera.frame.animate.move_to(
                complex_domain_stroke.get_center()
            ).set(width=target_width),
            run_time=3,
        )
        delaunay_mesh = DelaunayMesh(
            base_domain=complex_domain_stroke,
            target_element_size=0.35,
            mesh_color=GREEN,
            show_domain=True,
        )
        self.play(Create(delaunay_mesh),complex_domain_stroke.animate.set_stroke(width=0), run_time=4)
        self.wait(2)
AdaptiveMesh:
class AdaptiveMesh(Scene):
    """Example showing adaptive mesh refinement."""
    def construct(self):
        domain = CommplexElement(irregularity=0.25, seed=42)
        coarse = FiniteElement(
            base_domain=domain,
            element_type="quad",
            num_radial=3,
            num_angular=10,
            mesh_color=YELLOW,
            adaptive=False,
        )
        coarse.shift(LEFT * 3.5)
        adaptive = FiniteElement(
            base_domain=domain,
            element_type="quad",
            num_radial=5,
            num_angular=16,
            mesh_color=GREEN,
            adaptive=True,
        )
        adaptive.shift(RIGHT * 3.5)
        coarse_label = Text("Uniform Mesh", font_size=24).next_to(coarse, UP)
        adaptive_label = Text("Adaptive Mesh", font_size=24).next_to(adaptive, UP)
        self.add(coarse, adaptive, coarse_label, adaptive_label)
FunctionVisualization:
class FunctionVisualization(Scene):
    """Example scene showing how to visualize functions on finite element meshes."""
    def construct(self):
        domain = CommplexElement(irregularity=0.3, seed=123)
        mesh = FiniteElement(
            base_domain=domain,
            element_type="triangle",
            num_radial=6,
            num_angular=18,
            show_domain=True,
            domain_color=WHITE,
        )
        mesh.color_by_function(
            lambda x, y: np.sqrt(x**2 + y**2),
            color_range=[BLUE, RED],
            opacity=0.8
        )
        title = Text("Heat Distribution", font_size=32).to_edge(UP)
        self.add(mesh, title)
HighDensityTest:
class HighDensityTest(Scene):
    """Test with very fine mesh to ensure boundary conformity holds."""
    def construct(self):
        control_pts = [
            (2.0, 0.5),
            (1.5, 1.8),
            (-0.5, 2.2),
            (-2.0, 1.0),
            (-2.2, -0.8),
            (-0.8, -2.0),
            (1.5, -1.5),
        ]
        domain = CommplexElement(control_points=control_pts)
        mesh = FiniteElement(
            base_domain=domain,
            element_type="triangle",
            num_radial=10,
            num_angular=32,
            mesh_color=BLUE,
            mesh_opacity=0.25,
            show_domain=True,
            domain_color=RED,
            stroke_width=2,
        )
        title = Text("High Density Mesh Test", font_size=28).to_edge(UP)
        stats = Text(
            f"Elements: {len(mesh.mesh_elements)} | Divisions: 10 radial × 32 angular",
            font_size=16,
            color=GRAY
        ).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.add(mesh, title, stats)
ComparisonScene:
class ComparisonScene(Scene):
    """Compare different meshing algorithms."""
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Mesh Algorithm Comparison", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        self.add(title)
        control_pts = [
            (1.5, 0.0),
            (0.8, 1.2),
            (-0.8, 1.2),
            (-1.5, 0.0),
            (-0.8, -1.2),
            (0.8, -1.2),
        ]
        domains = []
        for i in range(3):
            domain = CommplexElement(control_points=control_pts, control_smoothness=24)
            domain_stroke = domain.complex_domain.copy().set_fill(
                opacity=0
            ).set_stroke(BLUE, width=2)
            domains.append(domain_stroke)
        domains[0].shift(LEFT * 4)
        domains[1].shift(ORIGIN)
        domains[2].shift(RIGHT * 4)
        labels = [
            Text("Random", font_size=24).next_to(domains[0], DOWN),
            Text("Poisson (Best)", font_size=24).next_to(domains[1], DOWN),
            Text("Structured", font_size=24).next_to(domains[2], DOWN),
        ]
        meshes = [
            AdvancedMesher(
                base_domain=domains[0],
                mesh_algorithm="delaunay",
                target_element_size=0.25,
                mesh_color=GREEN,
                fill_elements=True,
                fill_opacity=0.3,
                show_domain=False,
            ),
            AdvancedMesher(
                base_domain=domains[1],
                mesh_algorithm="poisson",
                target_element_size=0.25,
                mesh_color=GREEN,
                fill_elements=True,
                fill_opacity=0.3,
                show_domain=False,
            ),
            AdvancedMesher(
                base_domain=domains[2],
                mesh_algorithm="structured",
                target_element_size=0.25,
                mesh_color=GREEN,
                fill_elements=True,
                fill_opacity=0.3,
                show_domain=False,
            ),
        ]
        self.play(*[Create(d) for d in domains])
        self.play(*[Write(l) for l in labels])
        self.wait()
        self.play(*[Create(m) for m in meshes], run_time=4)
        self.wait(2)
AdvancedElementPickup:
class AdvancedElementPickup(MovingCameraScene):
    """Advanced demo with multiple element manipulations."""
    def construct(self):
        control_pts = [
            (2.5, 0.0),
            (1.5, 2.0),
            (-1.0, 2.2),
            (-2.5, 0.5),
            (-1.5, -1.5),
            (1.0, -2.0),
        ]
        domain = CommplexElement(control_points=control_pts, control_smoothness=32)
        domain_stroke = domain.complex_domain.copy().set_fill(
            opacity=0
        ).set_stroke(BLUE, width=3)
        self.add(domain_stroke)
        mesh = AdvancedMesher(
            base_domain=domain_stroke,
            mesh_algorithm="poisson",
            target_element_size=0.4,
            mesh_color=WHITE,
            mesh_stroke_width=1.5,
            show_domain=True,
            fill_elements=True,
            fill_opacity=0.4,
        )
        self.play(Create(mesh), run_time=3)
        self.wait()
        indices = [10, 25, 40]
        colors = [RED, GREEN, YELLOW]
        highlighted = []
        for idx, color in zip(indices, colors):
            if idx < len(mesh.elements):
                elem = mesh.get_element(idx)
                if elem:
                    self.play(
                        elem.animate.set_fill(color, opacity=0.9).set_stroke(color, width=4),
                        run_time=0.3
                    )
                    highlighted.append(elem)
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            *[elem.animate.scale(2) for elem in highlighted],
            run_time=1.5
        )
        self.wait()
        positions = [LEFT * 5 + UP * 2, ORIGIN + UP * 3, RIGHT * 5 + UP * 2]
        self.play(
            *[elem.animate.move_to(pos) for elem, pos in zip(highlighted, positions)],
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            domain_stroke.animate.scale(0.3).shift(DOWN * 2),
            mesh.animate.scale(0.3).shift(DOWN * 2),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait(2)
        self.play(*[FadeOut(elem) for elem in highlighted], run_time=1)
        self.wait()
ElementPickupDemo:
class ElementPickupDemo(MovingCameraScene):
    """Demo: Pick up an element, enlarge it, move it, and resize domain."""
    def construct(self):
        control_pts = [
            (2.0, 0.0),
            (1.0, 1.6),
            (-1.2, 1.4),
            (-2.0, 0.1),
            (-1.0, -1.2),
            (1.4, -1.6),
        ]
        complex_domain = CommplexElement(control_points=control_pts, control_smoothness=32)
        complex_domain_stroke = complex_domain.complex_domain.copy().set_fill(
            opacity=0
        ).set_stroke(BLUE, width=3)
        title = Text("Element Manipulation Demo", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        self.add(title)
        complex_domain_stroke.move_to(ORIGIN).shift(DOWN * 0.5)
        self.add(complex_domain_stroke)
        mesh = AdvancedMesher(
            base_domain=complex_domain_stroke,
            mesh_algorithm="poisson",
            target_element_size=0.35,
            mesh_color=WHITE,
            mesh_stroke_width=2,
            show_domain=False,
            fill_elements=True,
            fill_opacity=0.5,
        )
        self.play(Create(complex_domain_stroke), run_time=2)
        self.play(Create(mesh), run_time=3)
        self.wait()
        selected_index = len(mesh.elements) // 2
        selected_element = mesh.get_element(selected_index)
        if selected_element:
            original_color = selected_element.get_fill_color()
            self.play(
                selected_element.animate.set_fill(YELLOW, opacity=0.8).set_stroke(YELLOW, width=4),
                run_time=0.5
            )
            self.wait(0.5)
            element_copy = selected_element.copy()
            element_copy.set_z_index(10)
            original_position = selected_element.get_center()
            original_scale = 1.0
            self.play(
                element_copy.animate.scale(3).set_fill(RED, opacity=0.9).set_stroke(RED, width=5),
                run_time=1.5
            )
            self.wait(0.5)
            self.play(
                element_copy.animate.shift(LEFT * 4 + UP * 1),
                run_time=1.5
            )
            self.wait(0.5)
            label = Text("Selected Element", font_size=24, color=RED).next_to(element_copy, UP)
            self.play(Write(label), run_time=1)
            self.wait()
            self.play(
                element_copy.animate.shift(RIGHT * 8),
                label.animate.shift(RIGHT * 8),
                run_time=2
            )
            self.wait(0.5)
            self.play(
                Rotate(element_copy, angle=PI/3),
                run_time=1.5
            )
            self.wait()
            self.play(
                element_copy.animate.move_to(original_position).scale(1/3).set_fill(original_color, opacity=0.5).rotate(-PI/3),
                FadeOut(label),
                run_time=2
            )
            self.play(
                FadeOut(element_copy),
                selected_element.animate.set_fill(original_color, opacity=0.5).set_stroke(WHITE, width=2),
                run_time=0.5
            )
        self.wait()
        domain_label = Text("Shrinking Domain", font_size=28, color=BLUE).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(domain_label))
        self.play(
            complex_domain_stroke.animate.scale(0.5),
            mesh.animate.scale(0.5),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            complex_domain_stroke.animate.shift(LEFT * 2),
            mesh.animate.shift(LEFT * 2),
            run_time=1.5
        )
        self.play(
            complex_domain_stroke.animate.shift(RIGHT * 4),
            mesh.animate.shift(RIGHT * 4),
            run_time=1.5
        )
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            complex_domain_stroke.animate.move_to(ORIGIN).shift(DOWN * 0.5).scale(2),
            mesh.animate.move_to(ORIGIN).shift(DOWN * 0.5).scale(2),
            FadeOut(domain_label),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait(2)
MultiZoomDemo:
class MultiZoomDemo(Scene):
    """Demo with multiple simultaneous zoom views."""
    def construct(self):
        control_pts = [
            (1.8, 0.0),
            (1.2, 1.4),
            (-0.8, 1.5),
            (-1.8, 0.3),
            (-1.0, -1.2),
            (0.8, -1.4),
        ]
        domain = CommplexElement(control_points=control_pts, control_smoothness=32)
        domain_stroke = domain.complex_domain.copy().set_fill(
            opacity=0
        ).set_stroke(BLUE, width=3)
        domain_stroke.shift(LEFT * 3.5 + DOWN * 0.5)
        title = Text("Multi-Zone Mesh Analysis", font_size=30).to_edge(UP)
        self.add(title)
        self.add(domain_stroke)
        mesh = AdvancedMesher(
            base_domain=domain_stroke,
            mesh_algorithm="poisson",
            target_element_size=0.2,
            mesh_color=WHITE,
            mesh_stroke_width=1,
            show_domain=True,
            fill_elements=True,
            fill_opacity=0.3,
            show_nodes=True,
            node_radius=0.025,
        )
        self.play(Create(mesh), run_time=3)
        self.wait()
        all_mesh = list(mesh.elements)
        if mesh.domain_boundary:
            all_mesh.append(mesh.domain_boundary)
        if mesh.nodes:
            all_mesh.extend(mesh.nodes)
        zoom_configs = [
            {"prop": 0.1, "pos": [2.5, 2], "color": RED, "label": "Top"},
            {"prop": 0.35, "pos": [5.5, 2], "color": GREEN, "label": "Right"},
            {"prop": 0.6, "pos": [2.5, -1.5], "color": YELLOW, "label": "Bottom"},
            {"prop": 0.85, "pos": [5.5, -1.5], "color": PURPLE, "label": "Left"},
        ]
        zooms = []
        labels = []
        for config in zoom_configs:
            center = domain_stroke.point_from_proportion(config["prop"])[:2]
            zoom = ZoomCircle(
                source_objects=all_mesh,
                zoom_center=center,
                zoom_factor=3.5,
                circle_radius=1.2,
                display_position=config["pos"],
                circle_color=config["color"],
            )
            zooms.append(zoom)
            label = Text(config["label"], font_size=18, color=config["color"]).next_to(
                zoom, UP, buff=0.1
            )
            labels.append(label)
        self.play(
            *[Create(z) for z in zooms],
            *[Write(l) for l in labels],
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait(3)
        quality_text = Text(
            "Notice uniform mesh density at all boundaries",
            font_size=20,
            color=YELLOW
        ).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(quality_text))
        self.wait(3)
ZoomBoundaryDemo:
class ZoomBoundaryDemo(MovingCameraScene):
    """Demo showing zoom circles on mesh boundaries."""
    def construct(self):
        control_pts = [
            (2.5, 0.0),
            (1.5, 2.0),
            (-1.0, 2.2),
            (-2.5, 0.5),
            (-1.5, -1.5),
            (1.0, -2.0),
        ]
        complex_domain = CommplexElement(control_points=control_pts, control_smoothness=32)
        domain_stroke = complex_domain.complex_domain.copy().set_fill(
            opacity=0
        ).set_stroke(BLUE, width=3)
        domain_stroke.shift(LEFT * 2)
        title = Text("Mesh Boundary Zoom Analysis", font_size=32).to_edge(UP)
        self.add(title)
        self.add(domain_stroke)
        mesh = AdvancedMesher(
            base_domain=domain_stroke,
            mesh_algorithm="poisson",
            target_element_size=0.25,
            mesh_color=WHITE,
            mesh_stroke_width=1.5,
            show_domain=False,
            fill_elements=True,
            fill_opacity=0.4,
            show_nodes=True,
            node_radius=0.03,
        )
        self.play(Create(domain_stroke), run_time=2)
        self.play(Create(mesh), run_time=3)
        self.wait()
        zoom_point_1 = domain_stroke.point_from_proportion(0.1)[:2]
        zoom_label = Text("Zoom: Boundary Mesh Detail", font_size=24, color=YELLOW).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(zoom_label))
        all_mesh_objects = list(mesh.elements)
        if mesh.domain_boundary:
            all_mesh_objects.append(mesh.domain_boundary)
        if mesh.nodes:
            all_mesh_objects.extend(mesh.nodes)
        zoom1 = ZoomCircle(
            source_objects=all_mesh_objects,
            zoom_center=zoom_point_1,
            zoom_factor=4,
            circle_radius=2,
            display_position=[4, 1],
            circle_color=YELLOW,
        )
        self.play(Create(zoom1), run_time=2)
        self.wait(2)
        zoom_point_2 = domain_stroke.point_from_proportion(0.7)[:2]
        zoom2 = ZoomCircle(
            source_objects=all_mesh_objects,
            zoom_center=zoom_point_2,
            zoom_factor=4,
            circle_radius=2,
            display_position=[4, -1.5],
            circle_color=GREEN,
        )
        self.play(Create(zoom2), run_time=2)
        self.wait(2)
        zoom_label_2 = Text("Moving Zoom View", font_size=24, color=YELLOW).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Transform(zoom_label, zoom_label_2))
        positions = [0.1, 0.25, 0.4, 0.55, 0.7, 0.85]
        for pos in positions[1:]:
            new_center = domain_stroke.point_from_proportion(pos)[:2]
            new_zoom = ZoomCircle(
                source_objects=all_mesh_objects,
                zoom_center=new_center,
                zoom_factor=4,
                circle_radius=2,
                display_position=[4, 1],
                circle_color=YELLOW,
            )
            self.play(Transform(zoom1, new_zoom), run_time=1.5)
            self.wait(0.5)
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            FadeOut(zoom1),
            FadeOut(zoom2),
            FadeOut(zoom_label),
            run_time=1
        )
        self.wait(2)
SimpleZoomDemo:
class SimpleZoomDemo(Scene):
    """Super simple example."""
    def construct(self):
        circle = Circle(radius=2, color=BLUE, stroke_width=3)
        self.add(circle)
        mesh = SimpleMesh(circle, element_size=0.25)
        self.play(Create(mesh), run_time=2)
        self.wait()
        zoom = ZoomCircle(
            scene=self,
            zoom_center=circle.point_from_proportion(0.25),
            zoom_factor=3,
            radius=1.8,
            color=YELLOW
        )
        zoom.update_content()
        self.play(Create(zoom), run_time=2)
        self.wait(2)
